name: multi-module-planning
description: Decompose L3 multi-module requirements into staged backend, frontend, test, and risk plans
context_rules: Produce a staged plan before broad cross-stack changes.
Ask policy questions for underspecified rating semantics.

patch_strategy.summary: Produce multi-module staged plan only until rating policy is clarified.

acceptance_template: Backend, frontend, test, and risk workstreams are identified.
Ambiguous voting policy is clarified before code is applied.
